description: Production hardening release for Foundry v13 that matures existing isometric features, adds CI and regression gates, and improves release safety.

userStories.title: Enforce CI quality gates
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want automated CI checks for lint and tests so regressions are blocked before merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a PR workflow that runs npm run lint and npm test on pull requests and pushes to main.
Workflow fails when lint or tests fail.
Document required CI status checks in repository documentation.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add high-risk integration regression harness
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want repeatable regression checks for scene transforms and interaction flows so runtime issues are caught before release.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a harness for projection switching, pan/zoom, scene switch, token control switch, and door state changes.
Harness outputs include pass/fail evidence for each scenario.
Link harness usage from SMOKE-TEST.md and RELEASE-PROCESS.md.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Productionize occlusion behavior and defaults
userStories.description: As a GM, I want token silhouette occlusion to be predictable and performant so it is safe to use in production sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Occlusion lifecycle is stable across canvas init, scene switch, and canvas teardown with no stale containers or sprite leaks.
Document mode behavior (off, gpu, cpu modes) with production recommendations and default policy.
Record at least one completed profiling baseline run for the release candidate.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Productionize dynamic tile linked-wall behavior
userStories.description: As a GM/player, I want dynamic tile linked-wall visibility to be consistent during fast interaction so visibility behavior remains trustworthy.
acceptanceCriteria: Overlay rebuild path deterministically destroys and recreates cloned sprites without accumulation.
Behavior is defined and stable for no-controlled-token, rapid control switching, and scene transitions.
Linked doors and wall state changes trigger correct visibility updates.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Productionize token auto-sorting behavior
userStories.description: As a GM, I want token depth ordering to remain stable and intuitive so token front/back rendering matches visual expectation.
acceptanceCriteria: Document sorting ownership between display z-index path and document sort-write path.
Eliminate sort jitter and conflicting updates during rapid token movement.
Preserve controlled-token visibility boost without breaking relative depth order.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Clean v13 runtime boundaries and reduce code debt
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want runtime code aligned to v13 support so future changes are safer and easier to reason about.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove, isolate, or clearly mark non-executed legacy compatibility branches not relevant to v13 runtime.
Remove ambiguous commented experimental runtime paths from entry points.
Reduce lint warning count meaningfully from current baseline and track it in release notes.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Harden release tooling and release evidence flow
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a safer release process so packaging and publishing are reproducible and low-risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Separate packaging from irreversible git operations (commit, tag, push) or add explicit guardrails.
Require release evidence: smoke suite, high-risk matrix, profiling baseline, and CI pass.
Ensure release candidate checklist is executable without ad-hoc steps.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Align README and operator-facing documentation with shipped behavior
userStories.description: As a user and maintainer, I want docs that accurately reflect current feature status so configuration choices are clear.
acceptanceCriteria: README feature list, known bugs, and compatibility notes match current implementation.
Feature maturity labels for occlusion, dynamic tile, and auto-sorting are explicit and consistent.
Documentation references current smoke, release, and performance artifacts.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
